title: The Heiress
overview: The Heiress centers on the story of Luna, a mambabarang or a powerful demon sorceress, who will stop at nothing to keep to herself her young niece, Guia.

trailers.title: The Heiress Official Trailer: Opens November 27 in Cinemas Nationwide!
